Business: JTL Industries Limited manufactures and sells iron and steel products in India and internationally. It offers DFT Structural Steel Pipes, galvanized steel tubes and pipes, solar module mounting structures, hollow steel section, solar mounting structures, steel tubular poles, and metal crash barriers.   Current: 120.89  (-0.14% vs prior)

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
